contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/federal_account.md
contract.description: Returns federal accounts for a toptier agency with obligated and gross outlay totals plus their treasury account children for a selected fiscal year.

toptier_code.description: Numeric identifier for the toptier agency.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; 3- or 4-digit numeric string. Unknown numeric codes return JSON 404 with detail; non-numeric segments produce the platform's HTML 404.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; integer 2008-2026 inclusive. Defaults to the latest published year (2026 during probes). Values outside range raise 422, non-integers raise 400. Years before FY2017 succeed with empty results plus a warning message.

filter.description: Case-insensitive substring filter applied to federal account names and codes.
filter.constraints: Optional; unmatched filters yield empty results without error.

sort.description: Field used for sorting the federal accounts.
sort.constraints: Optional; allowed lowercase values: name, obligated_amount, gross_outlay_amount. Defaults to obligated_amount. Other inputs (including total_budgetary_resources) return 400.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected field.
order.constraints: Optional; allowed lowercase values: asc, desc. Defaults to desc and may be provided alone to flip the default ordering. Other casing (e.g., ASC) returns 400.

page.constraints: Optional; integer >= 1. Defaults to 1. Non-integers return 400, values below 1 return 422.

limit.constraints: Optional; integer 1-100. Defaults to 10. Non-integers return 400, values outside range return 422.

toptier_code.description: Echo of the requested toptier code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year used for the aggregation (defaults to the latest published year when omitted).

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the current request.

total.description: Total number of matching federal accounts for the query.

next.description: Next page number when additional pages exist.

results.description: Federal accounts with obligated and gross outlay totals plus their treasury account children. No responses exposed total_budgetary_resources despite documentation claims.

children.description: Treasury account children for the federal account.

messages.description: Array of warning or info strings, e.g., availability notices for pre-FY2017 requests.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Omitting fiscal_year defaults to the latest published year (2026 during probes).
Providing order without sort flips the default obligated_amount ordering to the requested direction.
Substring filters apply to both federal account names and codes (case-insensitive).
Requests for fiscal years before FY2017 return an empty result set with an availability warning in messages.
Requesting pages beyond available data returns 200 with empty results and metadata reflecting the requested page.
risks: Documentation references a top-level totals object and total_budgetary_resources fields that are absent from live responses; clients depending on them will fail.
Non-numeric toptier_code segments return an HTML 404 page instead of JSON, which can break JSON-only error handling.
Strict validation on parameter ranges and enum casing (asc/desc, sort keys) causes 400/422 errors when callers send unsupported values or capitalization.

probes.notes: Default request returns FY2026 data without the documented totals object.
Filter narrows results to mortgage accounts; pagination reflects total 3.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"086","fiscal_year":2008,"page_metadata":{"page":1,"total":0,"limit":5,...},"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected..."]}

probes.notes: Pre-FY2017 request returns empty results with a warning in messages.
Limit values below 1 are rejected with 422.
Limit above 100 triggers max-bound validation error.
Docs list total_budgetary_resources as sortable, but API rejects it with 400.
Order parameter is case-sensitive; uppercase ASC is rejected.
Alphabetic toptier_code returns an HTML 404 page instead of JSON.

mismatches: Documentation describes a top-level totals object, but live responses never include it.
Documentation states FederalAccount/TreasuryAccount items include total_budgetary_resources, but responses omit the field.
Documentation lists total_budgetary_resources as a valid sort key, yet the API returns HTTP 400 when it is requested.
risks: Documentation references a top-level totals object and total_budgetary_resources fields that are absent from live responses; clients depending on them will fail.
Non-numeric toptier_code segments return an HTML 404 page instead of JSON, which can break JSON-only error handling.
Strict validation on parameter ranges and enum casing (asc/desc, sort keys) causes 400/422 errors when callers send unsupported values or capitalization.
